prompt:
Using the attached photograph, produce the SAME EXACT SCENE but add ONE specific element: a thin pale curl of STEAM rising from the ceramic mug on the stool. The coffee is hot - the operator just stepped away.

KEEP, EXACTLY AS THEY ARE, IN THE SAME POSITIONS:
- the three vertical columns of small pinned printed tickets on the deep navy plaster wall (INTAKE / TRIAGE / AGENT / REVIEW / OUTPUT with timestamps)
- the brass thumbtacks pinning each ticket
- the desk lamp at camera-right, lit, throwing the same warm pool of light on the lower wall
- the warm chiaroscuro shadow falloff into deep navy upper wall
- the low stool with the ceramic mug, the closed leather notebook
- the lighting (single warm tungsten lamp), camera angle, focal length, depth of field, film grain, color grade, aspect ratio, and slight upper-right vignette
- the ceramic mug must stay in EXACTLY the same position and shape; no change to the mug itself

ADD, AND ONLY THIS:
- a thin, photographic, organic curl of pale grey-white STEAM rising from the top of the ceramic mug, drifting slightly leftward (toward camera-left, with the warm air current), then dissipating about 8-12 inches above the mug rim. The steam is delicate and translucent, not opaque or smoke-like. Caught faintly by the warm lamp light on its way up.

FORBID: any text overlay, any web UI, any persimmon orange, any added object besides the steam curl, any human or person, any change to the lamp's brightness or color temperature, any change to the cards, any change to the mug or notebook, any chimney-thick smoke (it is a delicate hot-coffee curl, not a plume), any change to the camera angle or framing.
